content: TASK-040 interrupt done: fixed the compact overview regression where additive zone boxes overlapped. Overview keeps tighter-than-original lane spacing, but the overview-only gap now leaves enough room for zone labels/padding; regression covers overview+zone overlay box overlap, and browser verification on examples/demo.html reports overlaps=[]. Next: continue TASK-009/TASK-010 acceptance work; consider 3D full icon-grid parity and subgraph overlay parity in 3D if the human asks. Keep TASK-011 QIF audit active and run full pattern verification only for routing/overlay/verifier changes or periodic audit.
